Petition To Compel Trustees Under Probate Code Sec 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustees Under Probate Code Sec 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser for Robert McDuffy.

Mr. Glasser reported that the case has settled, there is money in the trust account, and the only part of the settlement that needs to be completed is that the Trustee needs to provide bank statements and requests a continuance. The petition to compel trustees was continued to June 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser for Petitioners.

Mr. Glasser stated that he received a call from Ms. Shannon yesterday indicating that she was unable to attend due to a medical issue with her Husband. Mr. Glasser also stated that Ms. Shannon told him that they (Ms. Shannon and Mr. Miller) were the Trustees and that they never charged fees, that Mr. Miller would be here next week and that they were no where near getting an accounting done. In addition, Mr. Glasser stated that Ms. Shannon provide some history/information, that it was his inclination to visit both of them and look over records, that he needs to talk to his Clients and that he does not know if his Clients will waive an accounting. Status on filing of the accounting, the Petition to Compel Trustees and the Order to Appear were continued to January 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustees Under Probate Code Sec 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Continued To Jan-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser for Petitioner.

Mr. Glasser reported that he did not hear from anyone and the Order was served on Raphael Shannon and James Miller (Trustees) and that they are not present. An Order to Appear will be issued to Raphael Shannon and James Miller to appear on Decemer 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not filed their accounting and to appear. All matters are continued to December 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustees Under Probate Code Sec 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Continued To Dec-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustees Under Probate Code Sec 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Henry Glasser for Robert McDuffy.

Mr. Glasser stated that the Trustees (Mr. Miller and Mr. Shannon) have a long history of not responding, that no response was filed to his knowledge and that the Trustees were personally served. The Court stated that it is appropriate to compel an accounting and that it was prepared to do so pursuant to Probate Code 1060. The accounting must be filed by November 27, 2012. Status on filing of the accounting is set for November 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Miller and Mr. Shannon are ordered to appear on that date as well. The Petition to Compel Trustees Under Probate Code 17200, etc. was granted in part (subject to review of the order) and the remaining balance of the petition was also continued to November 27, 2012.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Petition To Compel Trustees Under Probate Code Sec 17200 Et Seq
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Oct-23-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
